---
name: 功能建议 / Feature Request
about: 建议新增功能或改进现有功能 / Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 功能类型 / Feature Type

<!-- 请选择 / Please select one -->

- [ ] 前端 UI 贡献 / Frontend UI contribution
- [ ] 后端功能新增 / Backend new feature
- [ ] 后端功能改进 / Backend improvement
- [ ] 文档改进 / Documentation
- [ ] 其他 / Other

## 使用场景 / Use Case

<!-- 为什么需要这个功能？解决什么问题？ -->
<!-- Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## 建议方案 / Proposed Solution

<!-- 你希望怎么实现？可以描述接口、行为、UI 等 -->
<!-- How would you like it implemented? Describe API, behavior, UI, etc. -->

## 替代方案 / Alternatives Considered

<!-- 有没有其他实现方式？为什么选择当前方案？ -->
<!-- Are there other implementation approaches? Why prefer the current one? -->

## 补充信息 / Additional Context

<!-- 截图、草图、参考链接等 -->
<!-- Screenshots, sketches, reference links, etc. -->

---

**提交前请确认 / Please confirm before submitting**:

- [ ] 我已搜索现有 Issue，确认这不是重复建议 / I have searched existing issues, this is not a duplicate
- [ ] 我已阅读 README 和 CONTRIBUTING，确认此功能在项目范围内 / I have read README and CONTRIBUTING, this feature is within project scope
